overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush swampy wilderness and approaching a tribal settlement with large mechanical-crystalline structures. The character walks across wooden bridges through water lily-covered wetlands before reaching an elaborately decorated entrance gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy forest trail with wooden walkways

agents.ego_description: walking across wooden bridges through shallow swamp water covered in lily pads

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a bridge over swamp water
murky water covered with green lily pads and aquatic vegetation
massive tree trunk covered in moss and hanging vines
tall mechanical structure with red crystalline growths emerging from the forest

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a dense swamp environment, walking across wooden footbridges over water covered in lily pads. Ancient trees with hanging moss surround the path, while distant mechanical spires hint at the settlement ahead.

events.description: exiting dense swamp canopy into open forest clearing with settlement spires visible in distance

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path toward the large settlement structures emerging from the treeline

entered.detail: worn dirt trail winding through the forest clearing
tall jagged structures of the tribal settlement with red and blue decorations
red glowing crystal growths attached to rocks and trees

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wide forest clearing with full sky visibility. The character follows a dirt path as large settlement spires with crystalline decorations become visible in the distance, replacing the dense swamp vegetation.

events.description: path surface transitions from dirt to moss-covered stone paving near the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the settlement entrance with weapon ready, passing tribal guards standing watch

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing watch with spear near the entrance path

entered.detail: large decorated entrance arch with red and blue crystalline spikes
wooden pole with tribal markings and feather decorations
rough wooden fence lining the approach path
moss-covered stone paving stones leading to the gate

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the settlement entrance along a stone-paved path, passing wooden barricades and tribal totems. The settlement gate with its elaborate crystalline decorations dominates the view ahead, while guards stand watch along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement interior with central arena

events.description: passing through the decorated archway into the Thornmarsh settlement interior
location name 'Thorn Marsh' appears on screen as character enters the central area

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement gate into the central arena area with other tribal members present

notable_agents.action: tribal warrior standing guard with weapon at the entrance

entered.detail: large circular pit with red interior surrounded by wooden scaffolding
ground covered in thick green moss and grass
wooden and thatch structures with tribal decorations and banners

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the decorated archway into the settlement interior, entering a moss-covered central area with a large circular arena pit. Tribal buildings and wooden scaffolding surround the space, with several tribal members standing about as the location name appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, mossy swamp into the heart of a crystalline tribal settlement. It begins with the character traversing wooden footbridges over lily-covered waters, surrounded by ancient trees and the distant silhouette of mechanical spires. As the dense vegetation gives way, the scene opens into a wide forest clearing where the camera follows a dirt path toward increasingly visible crystalline structures. The path then shifts to stone paving, passing tribal totems and guards before the camera approaches an elaborately decorated entrance gate. Finally, the movement carries the character through the archway and into a mossy central hub featuring a large circular arena pit and wooden scaffolding.
